description_long: This is a rectangular, two-drawer metal cabinet with a weathered, urban appearance. The front face features two circular metal knobs, graffiti-style drawings, and some etched symbols, including a hand sign and a face with X eyes. The left side displays a simple cat drawing and the number '1337', while the right side has a stick figure and the phrase 'M3TTA WUZ HERE' scratched into the surface. The back is plain, showing only the worn metallic finish. The entire object has a matte, slightly rough surface with visible signs of use and urban wear, suggesting it has been exposed to public or outdoor environments. The structure is solid and boxy, likely made primarily of metal, and is suitable for storing items in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A weathered, graffiti-marked metal two-drawer cabinet with circular knobs and urban etchings, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with circular knobs and graffiti, including a hand sign and face.
description_view_1: Left side view with a cat drawing and '1337' etched into the metal.
description_view_2: Back view, plain and unadorned, showing only the worn metallic surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with a stick figure and 'M3TTA WUZ HERE' scratched into the surface.
